text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Monday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Monday, October 07. You have an architecture review at 11 AM, and Ethan has piano with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick log: Updating our financial spreadsheets. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Sure thing! Smart financial planning. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. Let me know when you want to execute.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: We're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: He is doing so well. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Jarvis, We need to address some engineering concerns with the team. We got beta feedback from clinics suggesting they need patient onboarding immediately. Greg is not going to like this, but we have to push back.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. Let's break this down. We should prioritize these clinic requests. Let's create a dedicated sub-task in the CareConnect backlog. Would you like me to draft a summary for Greg?
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Anika Patel did a deep competitor analysis showing MyChart has patient onboarding. I want to make sure the team doesn't burn out.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! I've noted that. This competitor data is a powerful lever. You can use it to justify keeping patient onboarding in the MVP. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I checked the telemetry feeds. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Jarvis, Went for a run around the neighborhood. The pediatrician says Lily is growing on track. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. Excellent news. The pediatric report is saved in Lily's folder. Keep stretching that knee!
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Lily refused to eat her dinner today. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: Reviewing our household budget today. They requested our W-2 and bank statements. Need to make a final decision soon.
title: Finance Update

text: Budget tracking is updated. I have prepared a checklist of documents in your shared folder. Ready to calculate more rates.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick update: Ethan came home from Liberty Elementary in a great mood. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. He is growing up so fast.
title: Kids School Update

text: I can help with that. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I'll update the calendar reminder.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that just had a quick look at the CareConnect backlog. We are hitting major bottleneck issues with /appointment/notify under load. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. That sounds critical. We should implement a connection pool or check the indexing on the underlying tables for /appointment/notify. Let's verify this in the staging environment first.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Interesting. Here is what I recommend. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Reading scientific papers late tonight. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Got it, Mike. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Reviewing my sleep tracker logs. I only got 6 hours of sleep last night. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Understood. I've logged your vitals. Rest is critical. I suggest setting a bedtime reminder for 10 PM. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick log: Lily had a tough time at bedtime tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Hope tomorrow is a bit easier.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Lots of communication with Greg and Anika today. Dealt with bedtime tantrums but made it through. Got document checklists ready for the mortgage refinance. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
